import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import Navbar from '../../components/common/Navbar'; import GlassCard from '../../components/common/GlassCard'; import { Users, BookOpen, DollarSign, Activity, CheckCircle, Clock } from 'lucide-react'; import { useAuth } from '../../context/AuthContext'; const AdminDashboard = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalUsers: 0, parents: 0, sitters: 0, activeReservations: 0, totalIncome: 0, pendingPayments: 0 }); useEffect(() => { // Calculate all stats from localStorage const allUsers = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('users') || '[]'); const localSitters = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sitters') || '[]'); // We simulate that parents are total users minus sitters for this mock const parents = 15; // mock const sitters = localSitters.length + 8; // mock const reqs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('booking_requests') || '[]'); const active = reqs.filter(r => r.status === 'accepted').length + 3; const pendingPay = reqs.filter(r => r.status === 'accepted').length + 2; const completed = reqs.filter(r => r.status === 'completed').length + 10; // Calculate income (10% commission of completed requests) let income = 520; // base mock reqs.filter(r => r.status === 'completed').forEach(r => { income += (r.total * 0.10); }); setStats({ totalUsers: parents + sitters, parents, sitters, activeReservations: active, totalIncome: income, pendingPayments: pendingPay }); }, []); return (

); }; export default AdminDashboard;
